zh.Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易
zh.Champagne, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France: 法國阿奎泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Gauthier De Montsoreau II於1060年出生在法國安喬蒙左爾奧時，他的父親Lord Guillaume De Montsoreau35歲，母親Hersende Champagne25歲。他於1090年與Grescie MONTREUIL-BELLAY在法國安喬蒙左爾奧結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1124年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易享年64歲。

zh-hans.Champagne, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France: 法国阿奎泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Gauthier De Montsoreau II于1060年出生在法国安喬蒙左爾奧时，他的父亲Lord Guillaume De Montsoreau35岁，母亲Hersende Champagne25岁。他于1090年与Grescie MONTREUIL-BELLAY在法国安喬蒙左爾奧结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1124年在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Gauthier De Montsoreau II was born in 1060, in Montsoreau, Anjou, France, his father, Lord Guillaume De Montsoreau, was 35 and his mother, Hersende Champagne, was 25. He married Grescie MONTREUIL-BELLAY in 1090, in Montsoreau, Anjou, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1124, in Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Gauthier De Montsoreau II est né en 1060, à Montsoreau, Anjou, France, son père, Lord Guillaume De Montsoreau, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Hersende Champagne, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Grescie MONTREUIL-BELLAY en 1090, à Montsoreau, Anjou, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1124, à Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

Lui sposato Grescie MONTREUIL-BELLAY nel 1090, nel Montsoreau, Anjou, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1124, nel Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ko.Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르
ko.lifeSummary: Lord Gauthier De Montsoreau II(이)가 1060년 프랑스 앤조우 몽소로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Guillaume De Montsoreau(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Hersende Champagne(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1090년 프랑스 앤조우 몽소로에서 Grescie MONTREUIL-BELLAY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1124년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Gauthier De Montsoreau II родился в 1060 г. в местности монцоро, анджоу, Франция, его отцу по имени Lord Guillaume De Montsoreau было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Hersende Champagne, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Grescie MONTREUIL-BELLAY в 1090 г. в местности монцоро, анджоу, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1124 г. в местности меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.
